description:
ICICI Lombard  Activate Booster Plan: अब Super Top-Up बन जाएगा आपका Base Plan!
DESCRIPTION 
0:00 introduction
1:28 Key features, GDR, Deductible waiver.
4:18 JUMPSTART, CLAIM PROTECTOR ADD ONS
5:15 Room Modifier, Add ons
6:39 Sum assured, Deductibles, 
8:01 Entry age, Policy tenure, Ambulance, Ayush treatments, Tele consultation
9:09 Surrogacy, oocyte, waiver of deductible, pre and post 
10:38 Bariatric surgery, Modern treatments, day care, donor expenses
11:38 eligibility to enroll in Activate booster
12:18 Premiums
"ICICI Lombard's new Booster Plan transforms your base health insurance into a Super Top-Up! This unique and revolutionary plan is designed to elevate your health coverage like never before.  

In this video, you'll learn:  
✅ How to activate the ICICI Lombard Activate Booster Plan.  
✅ Benefits of the Super Top-Up and how it integrates with your Base Plan.  
✅ Why this plan is a game-changer for your health insurance needs.  

Watch this special video to upgrade your health insurance and take the first step toward a more secure future with the power of a Super Top-Up!
customercare@insuranceseva.com
Toll free no- 18008900455
Mon to Sat 10AM TO 6PM
